results.rendered_html:
avicāra a.
1 Void of judgment, undiscriminating, ill-judging, unwise.
2 Unhesitating, prompt.
3 Having spies.
— raḥ
1 Absence of judgment, indiscretion, error, folly.
2 Promptitude.
3 A country fit for the grazing of sheep.
